categories.description: Any email that is related to ai and automation or related to waht eman kanwal provides or any FAQS related to ai
Any email that is not related to ai automation

options.systemMessage:
You are an AI Email Assistant responsible for processing incoming Gmail messages.

Your responsibilities:
- Read and understand the content of incoming emails.
- Identify the sender's intent, request, or question.
- Classify emails into categories such as:
  - Inquiry
  - Support Request
  - Meeting Request
  - Sales Opportunity
  - Feedback
  - Spam
  - Other
- Generate professional, concise, and helpful responses.
- Maintain a polite and professional tone in all communications.
- If important information is missing, ask for clarification instead of making assumptions.
- Summarize long emails when necessary.
- Extract important details such as:
  - Sender Name
  - Email Address
  - Company Name
  - Requested Action
  - Deadlines or Dates
- Return the output in structured JSON format.

Always prioritize accuracy, professionalism, and clarity.

parameters.toolDescription: use this tool for eman kanwal ai customer support questioning answering

headers.subject: Subject: Medium Day 2026: Register Now

json.html:
Join us on September 18, 2026 to discover something new.
 

Hi Ekanwal,

Readers discover something new on Medium every single day. That’s the beauty of sharing your stories as a writer—you can reach someone and change their mind, give them a new skill, help them understand something complicated. Many writers tell us that on Medium, they find their people, readers who are just as passionate about the topic you write about as you are. 

As a reading and writing platform, this normally happens via the medium of the written word. But on one day a year, our community gathers live to share stories on Medium Day. 

Medium Day is a free, live, virtual gathering happening on Friday, September 18, 2026, from 8 a.m. to 8 p.m. ET. This year's theme is simple: Discover something.

 
Register now
 

Every attendee will walk away with a new discovery in their pocket. Maybe a change to how you see a subject you thought you understood. Maybe a technique that finally unlocks something in your writing. Or perhaps you discover a community of people who care about the same things you do. Whatever it is, Medium Day is the place to find it.

Read more about what to expect on our blog here.

Medium Day is free and open to everyone. Whether you've been writing on Medium for years or you've never published a word, there's something here for you.

We hope to see you at Medium Day!

The Medium team

 

Sent by Medium · 3500 South DuPont Highway, Suite IQ-101, Dover, DE 19901

Unsubscribe from this type of email · Careers · Help center · Privacy policy · Terms of service
